title: New York Institute of Technology - Canada.ca
content:
## New York Institute of Technology
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Master of Business Administration
- Master of Science in Cybersecurity
- Master of Cybersecurity
- Master of Energy Management
- Master of Science in Energy Management
- Master of Science in Instructional Technology – Program is no longer offered at this DLI. Students who completed this program prior to September 19th, 2023 should be considered eligible for PGWP.
- Master of Data Science
- Master of Computer Science
You are not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
